name: AI Tinkerers
tagline: The global community for hands‑on AI builders.
description: AI Tinkerers creates curated rooms for 116,000+ people shipping real AI systems across 245 cities. Monthly AI meetups with live code demos, hackathons, and technical talks. No slides, no pitches.

logo.notes: Primary lockup is the rounded indigo 'AI TINKERERS' wordmark on transparent PNG (760px, from the site nav/blog). wordmark-600 is the laptop-sticker variant of the same mark; favicon-0 is the square app icon; og-image is the social card.

colors.name: Slate 50
colors.usage: page canvas — measured on body { background-color: #f8fafc }; the site is light, not dark

colors.name: White
colors.usage: cards and raised surfaces (bg-white ×65) with 1px slate borders and shadow-sm

colors.name: Slate ink
colors.usage: headlines (text-slate-900) and primary body ink; also the dark footer band (bg-slate-950)

colors.name: Slate 500
colors.usage: secondary text, metadata, placeholders (with #475569 for stronger supporting copy)

colors.name: Tinkerers indigo
colors.usage: primary CTAs and brand buttons (.tw-button-brand); hover darkens to #253274

colors.name: Indigo bright
colors.usage: accent borders, highlighted chips and link-level emphasis (border-[#3d53c2], bg tints at /10–/20 opacity)

display.notes: Hero h1 is text-5xl/6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight; section heads run semibold/bold. Google Fonts now ships this family as 'Source Sans 3'.

body.notes: font-semibold (×235) is the workhorse emphasis weight.

mono.notes: System mono stack used for terminal-styled UI (.ait-cc-terminal) and code/telemetry readouts.

voice.tone: Direct, practitioner-to-practitioner, quietly confident. Short declarative sentences. Evidence over hype: 'Demos, traces, systems, and scars carry more weight than predictions.' Never salesy, never breathless about AI.
messagingPillars: The global community for hands‑on AI builders.
No slides, no pitches — working systems set the agenda.
Bring working code, share what broke, and leave with patterns you can ship.
Always curated: each city protects the room locally while contributing to a shared global standard.
Like the Homebrew Computer Club — small rooms where practitioners compare notes before the path is obvious.

imagery.style: Real documentary photography from actual meetups — crowded rooms, laptops open, someone demoing at a screen. Warm indoor light, candid framing, no stock photography.
imagery.treatment: Photos sit in rounded-2xl cards with soft slate shadows (0 12px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.12)) and hover scale-105. Playful collage accents: Pangolin handwritten 'sticky-tape' labels on a yellow gradient.

samples.caption: São Paulo meetup — homepage hero rotation

layout.spacing: 8px baseline grid, generous section padding on a centered max-width container
postureRules: Light slate canvas (#f8fafc) with white cards — dark is reserved for the footer band and terminal motifs
Cards: bg-white + 1px #e2e8f0 border + shadow-sm; hero photos get the deeper 0 12px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.12) shadow
Chips, tags and secondary buttons are full pills; primary CTAs are solid #31439b with white text
Accent is used sparingly: indigo buttons and #3d53c2 borders/tints, never large washes
One playful flourish: Pangolin handwritten sticky-tape labels over photo collages
